modes.label: Cloud
modes.description: Online provider routing for high-velocity reasoning, code, and continuity workflows without public credential exposure.

modes.label: Local
modes.description: Local GGUF or compatible runtime references for offline fallback and future sovereignty.

modes.label: Manual
modes.description: Prompt export, response paste-back, verification, and next-action extraction.

providers.label: OpenAI
providers.capability_notes: Cloud route for high-quality reasoning and coding. Public frontend must not hold API keys.

providers.label: Gemini
providers.capability_notes: Cloud route for multimodal and reasoning experiments through a future secure adapter.

providers.label: Local GGUF Runtime
providers.capability_notes: Local model route for manually configured runtime and model file references.

providers.label: Manual Provider Transfer
providers.capability_notes: Manual copy/paste workflow for providers that cannot be connected yet.
